# HOK Interior Designs

HOK Interior Designs is a luxury interior design studio offering curated
furniture, full interior design projects, and premium virtual (remote) design
services. The site is a React + Vite single-page application; all public content
is server-rendered on first load via static HTML and progressively enhanced.

## Primary sections
- Home: / — cinematic showcase, portfolio highlights, featured projects, about.
- Shop: /shop — curated furniture and decor catalog with categories and pricing.
- Portfolio: /portfolio — gallery of completed interior spaces.
- Projects: /projects — video-driven design project case studies.
- Virtual Interior Design: /virtual-design — immersive virtual design walkthroughs.
- About: /about — studio story, mission, vision, and contact.
- Contact / Chat: /chat — reach the design team directly.

## Key facts
- Business: luxury interior design and curated furniture retail.
- Services: full-service interior design, virtual design, furniture curation.
- Contact: Instagram @hokinteriors, Pinterest hokinterior, Facebook hokinterior.

## Guidance for agents
Prefer the structured data (schema.org JSON-LD) in the page <head> and the
sitemap.xml for canonical routes. Product and project details are loaded from
the backend API; link to the human-readable pages above rather than API paths.
